What_do_you_want_to_learn?: What do you want to learn?
motivation_1: The Key to New Language Heights,
motivation_description_1: The basic structure of language lies in words. Let's start with simple ones and gradually rise to new levels together.
motivation_description_2: The Fast Brain Method for Effective Memorization Using Advanced Spaced Repetition Technology,
motivation_description_3: Eight new words every day, and in a month you'll know more than 250 words!
motivation_description_4: Your app, your rules. It adapts to your interests, progress, and study frequency.

Invite your friends and 
get rewards
descrip_invest_your_friends:
Share the app with a friend so they can download 
and install it. If they enter your referral code 
during registration, you'll both receive 20 coins in
your accounts.
streak_subtitle: Keep it up! Study every day.
streak_first_day_subtitle: Come back tomorrow to keep your streak alive.
streak_push_day_1: Great start 👏 you began today. Keep going.
streak_push_day_2: 2 days in a row 🔥 this is getting serious. Nice start.
streak_push_day_3: 3 days in a row!🔥 No words — respect!
streak_push_day_4: 4 days 👀 you're on the right path. Keep it up.
streak_push_day_5: 5 days in a row 💪! I'm proud — don't stop now.
streak_push_day_6: 6 days 🔥 many already quit. You're strong.
streak_push_day_7: 7 days 👏 a full week! You're better than 72% of learners. Keep it.
streak_push_day_8: 8 days 😏 now you're serious. Don't stop.
streak_push_day_9: 9 days 🔥 almost at a big milestone. You're doing great.
streak_push_day_10:
10 days 👏 excellent! You're better than 80% of others.
🎁 Today you get Premium for one day free — keep going!
streak_push_day_11: 11 days 🔥 68% fell behind. You're ahead. Don't stop.
streak_push_day_12: 12 days 👀 this is a habit now. You're on another level.
streak_push_day_13: 13 days 💪 few make it this far. I'm proud.
streak_push_day_14: 14 days 🔥 two full weeks. You can't be stopped.
streak_push_day_15:
15 days 👏 very strong! You're better than 85% of learners.
🎁 Premium for one day — keep going.
streak_push_day_16: 16 days 😏 no turning back. You're on the way.
streak_push_day_17: 17 days 🔥 most never reach this. But you do.
streak_push_day_18: Who even are you? 18 days 👏 you're a serious learner. Don't break it.
streak_push_day_19: 19 days 💪 a big milestone is close. Great work.
streak_push_day_20:
20 days 🔥 you're better than 88% of others.
🎁 Premium unlocked — use it today.
streak_push_day_21: 21 days 👏 3 full weeks! This is part of who you are now.
streak_push_day_22: 22 days 😏 many already quit. But not you.
streak_push_day_23: 23 days 🔥 you're rock solid. I respect this.
streak_push_day_24: 24 days in a row 👀 now you're a serious learner.
streak_push_day_25: Whoaaa 25 days? 💪 Almost a month. That's a lot.
streak_push_day_26: 26 days 🔥 90% never make it here. You do.
streak_push_day_27: Respect, 27 days 👏 I'm proud. But don't stop.
streak_push_day_28: 28 days 😏 almost a month straight. This is a habit now.
streak_push_day_29: 29 days 🔥 one step away from 30. Don't break it.
streak_push_day_30:
30 days 👏👏 legendary! You're better than 95% of learners.
🎁 Special Premium + bonus unlocked for you. Keep going!
inactivity_push_day_1: Hey 👋 didn't forget English today, right? Spare 5 minutes and come learn.
inactivity_push_day_2: 2 days no English 😏 is this how you learn? Not even 5 minutes?
inactivity_push_day_3: Well, what's up? Are you learning English or just watching? 🔥 Come in already!
inactivity_push_day_4: Still silence 😄 English won't learn itself. At least do 5 minutes.
inactivity_push_day_5: Honestly — are you learning the language? 5 days you haven't come in 😏 Come today.
inactivity_push_day_6: You last opened English app 6 days ago 👀 Instagram? 6 minutes ago! Come in already.
inactivity_push_day_7: Seven days… 😬 Just between us — SHAME ON YOU! Come start today.
inactivity_push_day_8: Dude, truth is — I just saw a learner like you. You know yourself.
inactivity_push_day_9: Your learned words are being forgotten 😕 come for 5 minutes, review them.
inactivity_push_day_10:
Real talk — you won't learn ENGLISH this way 😏
Out of 24 hours spend 5 on English, the world won't flip. You benefit.
active_push_day_1: 🌱 Welcome! Your journey started today — your first words are waiting!
active_push_day_2: 🔥 You were active yesterday — nice! Let's learn a few new words today too!
active_push_day_3: ⚡ Three days in a row! Today's words are waiting, come quick!
active_push_day_4: 🎯 Four days — the habit is forming! Spare five minutes today too.
active_push_day_5: 🏆 Half a week — nice job, champ! New words are waiting for you.
active_push_day_6: 😎 Six days — you're serious! Let's finish today strong too!
active_push_day_7: 🎉 A full week — WOW! This is success, let's keep going!
active_push_day_8: 🚀 Eight days — WELL DONE! Let's do a quick round today too!
active_push_day_9: 😄 Day nine — rewards are close! One step left, come in!
active_push_day_10: 🥳 TEN DAYS — no words, bro! Come grab your reward! Premium for 1 day!

about_description_content: "VozhaOmuz" is a mobile application designed to help learn foreign words and phrases. Our mission is to make learning foreign languages easy, engaging, and productive.
about_features_content:
- Interactive lessons: Learn new words through interactive lessons with graphics and audio support.

- Testing: Test your knowledge with tests on various topics.
- Training: Review and reinforce words with daily training sessions.
- Statistics: Track your progress and achievements in the statistics section.
about_developers_content: "VozhaOmuz" was developed by the DonishSoft team, ZabonOmuz educators and developers united by the desire to make language learning accessible and engaging.
about_thanks_content: We express our gratitude to our user community for valuable feedback and suggestions that help make "VozhaOmuz" better.
about_license_content: All materials and content in the application are protected by copyright. Unauthorized copying or distribution of materials is prohibited.
about_contacts_content: If you have questions or suggestions, contact us at info@donishsoft.com.
profile_logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
privacy_general_content: Our application respects your privacy and strives to ensure the security of your personal data. This privacy policy describes what data we collect, for what purposes and how we use it.
privacy_collection_content: The VozhaOmuz app only collects data necessary for the operation and improvement of the application. We do not collect any personal information unless you voluntarily provide it to us.
privacy_usage_content: Your data is used exclusively to provide application features such as saving progress, statistics and settings. We do not share your data with third parties without your explicit consent.
privacy_protection_content: We use modern encryption and security methods to protect your data from unauthorized access.
privacy_device_content: The application may request access to certain features of your device, such as the microphone, for speech recognition when learning words. We never use these features without your permission and only in accordance with your settings.
privacy_changes_content: We may update our privacy policy from time to time. All changes will be published in this section of the application.
